display_name: TNAU Agritech Portal — Tomato bacterial wilt management
licence: Government of India / state university — attribution required
notes: Bacterial wilt management guidance from TNAU. Useful cross-regional signal for Sri Lanka, where HORDI offers no chemical option — but the specific rates (neem cake 100 kg/acre, bleaching powder 4 kg/ac) must be re-validated by a Sri Lanka agronomist before being applied to dry-zone soils.
